questions.text: Has a documentation strategy been defined from the early stages of the AI system design to provide appropriate coverage?
questions.category: Plan from design and conception, to commissioning, preparation of technical documentation

questions.text: Does the planning include clear milestones and responsible parties to guarantee the traceability of the technical documentation process?
questions.category: Plan from design and conception, to commissioning, preparation of technical documentation

questions.text: ¿Existe un calendario establecido para revisar y actualizar la documentación técnica?
questions.category: Have a periodic update plan for updating technical documentation

questions.text: ¿El plan de actualización tiene en cuenta cambios regulatorios, técnicos o de contexto operativo del sistema que producirán adicionales actualizaciones cuando surjan?
questions.category: Have a periodic update plan for updating technical documentation

questions.text: Is there a set schedule for reviewing and updating the technical documentation?
questions.category: Establish a procedure for tracking AI system changes that allows documentation to be updated continuously and consistently

questions.text: Does the upgrade plan take into account regulatory, technical, or operational context changes to the system that will result in additional updates when they arise?
questions.category: Establish a procedure for tracking AI system changes that allows documentation to be updated continuously and consistently

questions.text: Has an internal communication plan been designed to share the key content of the technical documentation between the different areas involved?
questions.category: Plan the communication to the different areas, and in a transversal way, of the content and objective of the technical documentation

questions.text: Has it been verified that all areas understand the purpose of the technical documentation in relation to their functions?
questions.category: Plan the communication to the different areas, and in a transversal way, of the content and objective of the technical documentation

questions.text: Has a person in charge of technical documentation been formally appointed with cross-cutting authority to coordinate its preparation and supervision?
questions.category: Designate a person responsible for the technical documentation

questions.text: Does the manager have the resources and knowledge to carry out this task effectively?
questions.category: Designate a person responsible for the technical documentation

questions.text: Have specific documentation managers been assigned for each key area (data, security, risks, etc.)?
questions.category: Define specific responsible persons for each relevant area

questions.text: Do the designated managers have the technical skills to correctly document their scope?
questions.category: Define specific responsible persons for each relevant area

questions.text: Is there a single, secure, and accessible repository to store the system's technical documentation?
questions.category: Implement a document management system or centralized repository for technical documentation

questions.text: Does the document management system allow version control, access permissions and audits?
questions.category: Implement a document management system or centralized repository for technical documentation

questions.text: Has it been verified that all managers have adequate access to the document management system?
questions.category: Ensure that those responsible for technical documentation have access to the document management system

questions.text: Are there differentiated access policies according to roles and responsibilities?
questions.category: Ensure that those responsible for technical documentation have access to the document management system

questions.text: Have security and backup measures (backups, redundancy, etc.) been implemented to preserve the integrity of the technical documentation?
questions.category: Ensure that the document management system has mechanisms that guarantee the conservation of documentation

questions.text: Are periodic audits carried out to verify that these mechanisms are active and functioning correctly?
questions.category: Ensure that the document management system has mechanisms that guarantee the conservation of documentation

questions.text: Do those responsible for the deployment have clear and direct access to the instructions and documentation necessary for their task?
questions.category: Ensure that instructions for those responsible for system deployment are accessible to them

questions.text: Is it regularly validated that this documentation is up-to-date, understandable and complete from an operational point of view?
questions.category: Ensure that instructions for those responsible for system deployment are accessible to them

questions.text: Is there a procedure for regularly updating the deployment instructions for the AI system?
questions.category: Keep system deployment instructions up to date

questions.text: Are those responsible for deployment notified when instructions have been modified or updated?
questions.category: Keep system deployment instructions up to date

questions.text: Have you defined a frequency and evaluation criteria for auditing the system's technical documentation?
questions.category: Plan and execute regular audits on the status of technical documentation

questions.text: Do the audits include verifications on the traceability, updating and accessibility of the documentation?
questions.category: Plan and execute regular audits on the status of technical documentation

questions.text: Has an identification of relevant harmonised standards (CEN/CENELEC, ISO, NIST, etc.) applicable to the system been carried out?
questions.category: Identify the available and relevant approved harmonised standards

questions.text: Is there regular monitoring of regulatory changes that may affect compliance with the system?
questions.category: Identify the available and relevant approved harmonised standards

questions.text: Has the possibility of applying recognized quality seals or certifications for the type of AI system developed been evaluated?
questions.category: Apply existing quality seals that are relevant to the system

questions.text: Is there evidence of compliance with the criteria required by these quality seals?
questions.category: Apply existing quality seals that are relevant to the system

questions.text: Does the repository used ensure the secure and durable storage of the technical documentation for at least 10 years?
questions.category: Keep the technical documentation in a repository for at least 10 years

questions.text: Does the system allow immediate access by the competent national authorities to such documentation when required?
questions.category: Keep the technical documentation in a repository for at least 10 years

questions.text: Has the quality management system documentation been included in the official conservation repository?
questions.category: Keep the documentation relating to the quality management system in a repository

questions.text: Is it guaranteed to be available for at least 10 years and to be accessible to competent authorities?
questions.category: Keep the documentation relating to the quality management system in a repository

questions.text: Are approvals and evidence of changes by notified bodies retained in a centralized, secure repository?
questions.category: Establish a conservation plan for documentation relating to changes approved by notified bodies

questions.text: Does the plan contemplate conservation for at least 10 years, guaranteeing the solidity of the solution (technological or not) that is decided to be used for such conservation?
questions.category: Establish a conservation plan for documentation relating to changes approved by notified bodies

questions.text: Does the system provide for the retention of decisions and documents issued by notified bodies?
questions.category: Establish a conservation plan for decisions and other documents issued by notified bodies

questions.text: Is its conservation and access for at least 10 years in a suitable repository ensured?
questions.category: Establish a conservation plan for decisions and other documents issued by notified bodies

questions.text: Is the declaration of conformity archived in a repository that ensures the availability and retention of the declaration of conformity for at least 10 years?
questions.category: Conservation plan for declaration of conformity

questions.text: Have regular audits of the Documentation Retention Mechanism been established?
questions.category: Regularly audit the retention mechanism and repository

questions.text: Is its correct functioning and compliance with conservation obligations checked?
questions.category: Regularly audit the retention mechanism and repository

questions.text: Does the retention mechanism ensure continued access to technical documentation even if the supplier ceases operations?
questions.category: Ensure that the retention mechanism and repository ensure access even if the provider disappears

questions.text: Have legal and technical measures been taken to ensure this future availability?
questions.category: Ensure that the retention mechanism and repository ensure access even if the provider disappears

questions.text: Does the technical documentation clearly include the purpose of the system, the name of the supplier and the corresponding version?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of purpose and version of the system

questions.text: Is traceability indicated between previous versions and the current version of the documented system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of purpose and version of the system

questions.text: Has it been properly documented how the system communicates or can interoperate with other external systems?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of interaction with other systems

questions.text: Have the compatibility requirements necessary to ensure such interoperability also been documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of interaction with other systems

questions.text: Does the documentation include the versions used and the procedures required for updates or patches?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of versions and updates

questions.text: Is the planned upgrade policy indicated to maintain the security and functionality of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of versions and updates

questions.text: Is the way the system is distributed and deployed (e.g., API, download, embedded software) detailed?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of forms of distribution

questions.text: Is clear documentation provided for each mode of commissioning of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of forms of distribution

questions.text: Has the type of hardware required or recommended for the proper operation of the system been documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of hardware foreseen

questions.text: Are possible limitations or incompatibilities of the system specified with certain hardware (power requirements, need for refueling, etc.)?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of hardware foreseen

questions.text: Are visual elements such as product images, markup, or internal settings included, if applicable?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of appearance and physical integration

questions.text: Are the illustrations correctly associated with relevant technical descriptions within the documentation?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of appearance and physical integration

questions.text: Does the documentation contain a comprehensible and sufficient description of the user interface for the system operator?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of the interface for deployment

questions.text: Have visual examples or diagrams been included that allow the deployment manager to familiarize themselves with the interface before use?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of the interface for deployment

questions.text: Have the third-party tools and models used in the development of the system been documented, as well as their integration or modification?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of use and interface for deployment

questions.text: Have the risks arising from the use of third-party tools or models been assessed and documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of methods and tools used

questions.text: Have all the technical design elements of the system, including the algorithms used, been clearly and accessibly documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of design, logic and objectives

questions.text: Does the documentation include the technical concessions made and how they affect the performance or security of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of design, logic and objectives

questions.text: Does the documentation include a comprehensive schematic of the system's architecture and the interaction between its components?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of architecture and resources used

questions.text: Are the computational resources used and the platforms used in each phase of the development cycle described?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of architecture and resources used

questions.text: Have the data and methodologies used in the training, testing and validation of the system been documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of data and training

questions.text: Is there evidence of data quality control and labelling and cleaning processes carried out?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of data and training

questions.text: Have the measures that allow human supervision of the system during its use been evaluated?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of human supervision and interpretation

questions.text: Does the documentation include tools or mechanisms designed for users to correctly interpret the results?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of human supervision and interpretation

questions.text: Have the planned changes that could be applied to the system and their technical impact been documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of predetermined changes and compliance

questions.text: Are validation procedures specified to ensure that these changes do not compromise the conformity of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of predetermined changes and compliance

questions.text: Are the protection measures applied to guarantee the cybersecurity of the AI system detailed?
questions.category: Minimum cybersecurity documentary content

questions.text: Does the documentation include vulnerability assessments and mechanisms for managing security incidents?
questions.category: Minimum cybersecurity documentary content

questions.text: Are potential adverse outcomes and risks associated with the system adequately identified and documented?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of human operation and supervision

questions.text: Does the documentation include mechanisms to mitigate and monitor these risks throughout the system lifecycle?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of human operation and supervision

questions.text: Have the roles and responsibilities of the deployment manager been clearly specified with respect to monitoring the system?
questions.category: Human oversight measures

questions.text: Has the training or training necessary for this profile to understand and correctly interpret the results been described?
questions.category: Human oversight measures

questions.text: Does the documentation justify the established performance parameters and their alignment with the purpose of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of performance parameters

questions.text: Have these parameters been validated in documented tests?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of performance parameters

questions.text: Has a risk management system been documented that complies with the provisions of Article 9 of the regulation?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of risk management system

questions.text: Is it specified how this system is updated in the face of relevant changes in the life cycle of the AI system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of risk management system

questions.text: Does the documentation clearly specify which harmonized norms or technical standards have been followed for the development of the system?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of applied and alternative standards

questions.text: Have the solutions adopted in cases where harmonised standards have not been applied adequately justified?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of applied and alternative standards

questions.text: Has a valid copy of the system's declaration of conformity with the applicable regulation been included in the documentation?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of the EU declaration of conformity

questions.text: Is it verified that this declaration is signed by the authorised supplier and makes explicit reference to Article 47?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of the EU declaration of conformity

questions.text: Has an AI system been defined for evaluating the performance of the AI system after commercial deployment?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of post-market surveillance

questions.text: Does the post-marketing surveillance plan include mechanisms for collecting information, audits and continuous improvements?
questions.category: Minimum documentary content of post-market surveillance
